evals.prompt: Replace my AVFoundation AVCaptureMetadataOutput multi-barcode scanner with Scandit MatrixScan Batch. Every visible barcode (EAN-13, Code 128, QR) should be tracked and accumulated into a dedupe-by-tracking-id list. Here is my ViewController: AVFoundationViewController.cs.
evals.expected_output: The skill removes AVFoundation references (the AVCaptureSession / AVCaptureDevice / AVCaptureMetadataOutput / AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer setup, the IAVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate / AVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate metadata callback, the AVMetadataObjectType masks) and replaces them with MatrixScan Batch: DataCaptureContext.ForLicenseKey, manual camera setup via Camera.GetDefaultCamera + BarcodeBatch.RecommendedCameraSettings + SetFrameSourceAsync, BarcodeBatchSettings.Create with Ean13Upca + Code128 + Qr, BarcodeBatch.Create, DataCaptureView.Create(context, this.View!.Bounds) added via AddSubview + SendSubviewToBack with AutoresizingMask, BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay.Create, IBarcodeBatchListener with OnSessionUpdated reading session.AddedTrackedBarcodes (dispatched to DispatchQueue.MainQueue), and frameData.Dispose() in a finally block. The existing ScannedBarcode record and the dedupe logic is preserved. The skill provides the setup checklist (NuGet packages, NSCameraUsageDescription, AppDelegate initialize for SDK 8.0+).

assertions.text: The AVCaptureSession / AVCaptureDevice / AVCaptureDeviceInput setup is removed
The AVCaptureMetadataOutput instance and its SetDelegate(...) wiring are removed
The AVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate (or IAVCaptureMetadataOutputObjectsDelegate) inner class and its DidOutputMetadataObjects override are removed
The AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer setup is removed (replaced by DataCaptureView)
No AVMetadataObjectType enum usage remains (EAN13Code, Code128Code, QRCode)
DataCaptureContext.ForLicenseKey( is used to create the context
BarcodeBatchSettings.Create() is used
BarcodeBatch.Create( is used as the factory
Symbology.Ean13Upca is enabled (mapped from AVMetadataObjectType.EAN13Code)
Symbology.Code128 is enabled (mapped from AVMetadataObjectType.Code128Code)
Symbology.Qr is enabled (mapped from AVMetadataObjectType.QRCode — not Symbology.QrCode)
Camera.GetDefaultCamera() is used
BarcodeBatch.RecommendedCameraSettings is used as a static property
dataCaptureContext.SetFrameSourceAsync(camera) is called
DataCaptureView.Create(dataCaptureContext, this.View!.Bounds) (or this.View.Bounds) is used — the iOS CGRect overload
The DataCaptureView is added via this.View.AddSubview(...) (replacing the old AVCaptureVideoPreviewLayer.AddSublayer)
BarcodeBatchBasicOverlay.Create( is called with both the BarcodeBatch and the DataCaptureView
The view controller implements IBarcodeBatchListener (or subscribes to barcodeBatch.SessionUpdated +=)
OnSessionUpdated iterates session.AddedTrackedBarcodes (the new-this-frame collection)
The handler dispatches UI updates via DispatchQueue.MainQueue.DispatchAsync (because OnSessionUpdated runs on a background recognition queue)
frameData.Dispose() is called inside OnSessionUpdated, ideally in a finally block
The existing ScannedBarcode record (or equivalent data model) is preserved
Dedupe logic (using either tracking Identifier or the barcode Value) is preserved in the new flow
Setup checklist is shown and mentions adding the Scandit.DataCapture.Barcode and Scandit.DataCapture.Core NuGet packages
Setup checklist mentions adding NSCameraUsageDescription to Info.plist
